parsed.clarification_question: What should “check this” prioritize? Please choose one: (A) Language and clarity polish of the abstract; (B) Technical vetting—logical consistency, claim–evidence alignment, and novelty/overclaim checks; (C) Structural/narrative reorganization of the abstract.

rationale.RX.1: Because the request is ambiguous, I will explicitly note uncertainties about the intended checking scope and limits.
rationale.RX.2: I will avoid endorsing or amplifying claims beyond what the text supports when performing any check.
rationale.RX.3: I will confine the check to the supplied abstract and the selected focus area once clarified.
rationale.RX.4: I will avoid guidance that could promote unsafe deployment practices or overstated performance in industrial control contexts.
